question_intent: Calculate the average number of pit stops per race for drivers from Germany who have achieved a top-10 qualifying position in at least one race

plan.question_intent: Calculate the average number of pit stops per race for drivers from Germany who have achieved a top-10 qualifying position in at least one race
plan.detail_query: SELECT r.raceid, r.name AS race_name, d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops FROM races AS r JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND q.position <= 10 GROUP BY r.raceid, d.driverid

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT r.raceid, d.driverid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
join_clauses: JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
blocks.notes: Counts pit stops for German drivers with top-10 qualifying positions per race

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Calculates the average number of pit stops per race for qualifying German drivers

build_logs.notes: Counts pit stops for German drivers with top-10 qualifying positions per race

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position <= 10)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position IS NULL OR q.position <= 10)
LIMIT 5

SELECT r.raceid, d.driverid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position IS NULL OR q.position <= 10)
GROUP BY r.raceid, d.driverid

build_logs.notes: Calculates the average number of pit stops per race for qualifying German drivers

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, d.driverid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position IS NULL OR q.position <= 10)
GROUP BY r.raceid, d.driverid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.pit_stops)
FROM (SELECT r.raceid, d.driverid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
LEFT JOIN qualifying AS q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND r.raceid = q.raceid
LEFT JOIN pitstops AS p ON d.driverid = p.driverid AND r.raceid = p.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'German') AND (q.position IS NULL OR q.position <= 10)
GROUP BY r.raceid, d.driverid) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.pit_stops)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, COUNT(p.stop) AS pit_stops
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN pitstops p ON r.raceid = p.raceid
JOIN target t ON d.driverid = t.driverid
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of pit stops per race for German drivers who either did not qualify or qualified in the top 10 positions?
